---
title: "Start an editing session"
subtitle: "BNR info-hub Technical Manual"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---

# Start an editing session

## Purpose

This guide explains how to begin routine work on the BNR `info-hub`.

Use it when the repository is already set up on your machine and you want to edit pages, run a briefing, preview the site, or prepare a commit.

## Standard local path

```text
C:\yoshimi-hot\output\analyse-bnr\info-hub
```

Future users may have a different path. They should record it in their local setup notes.

# Stage 1: Open the repo

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 1. Open the project folder

Open VS Code and open:

```text
C:\yoshimi-hot\output\analyse-bnr\info-hub
```

Open the terminal with:

```text
Ctrl + J
```
:::

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 2. Confirm the terminal location

Run:

```powershell
pwd
```

If needed, move to the repo root:

```powershell
cd C:\yoshimi-hot\output\analyse-bnr\info-hub
```
:::

# Stage 2: Check current repo state

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 1. Check Git status

Run:

```powershell
git status
```

Review existing changed or untracked files before starting new work.
:::

:::{.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## What to look for

Expected changes may include:

```text
site/...
scripts/stata/...
outputs/public/...
site/downloads/files/...
DECISIONS.md
CHANGELOG.md
```

Unexpected files may include:

```text
site/_site/
site/.quarto/
*.log
*.dta
private data
local path files
```
:::

# Stage 3: Start preview if needed

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 1. Move to the site folder

```powershell
cd C:\yoshimi-hot\output\analyse-bnr\info-hub\site
```
:::

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 2. Start Quarto preview

```powershell
quarto preview --port 4200
```
:::

# Stage 4: End cleanly

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 1. Stop preview

Press:

```text
Ctrl + C
```
:::

:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Step 2. Check Git before leaving

```powershell
cd C:\yoshimi-hot\output\analyse-bnr\info-hub
git status
```
:::
